docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY JIMENEZ, NALLELY AS TO DEFENDANT CALLO, ABRAHAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, NALLELY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALLO, ABRAHAM $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-25-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "TO BE HEARD WITH CASE NO.824387", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2008 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CALLO, ABRAHAM
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
